description_long: This is a large, modern residential house complex with multiple interconnected structures, surrounded by a paved driveway and numerous trees. The main building features a mix of flat and low-pitched roofs, with several visible chimneys and skylights. There is a detached garage or outbuilding at the rear, and a swimming pool is visible adjacent to the main house. The property is bordered by rows of mature trees, providing privacy and a landscaped appearance. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some large picture windows and standard rectangular panes. The entryway is prominent, featuring a covered porch and a driveway leading directly to the front door.
description: A large, modern house complex with flat and low-pitched roofs, surrounded by trees, a driveway, a detached garage, and a swimming pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, attached garage, and landscaped trees lining the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive tree border, rear parking area, and the back of the main house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detached garage, pool area, and the back façade of the house with multiple windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the roof layout, tree-lined perimeter, and the spatial relationship between the main house and outbuildings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and standard rectangular panes
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with steps, wide front door, and direct driveway access
